steps.title: Spot the emotional signal
steps.content: The word “guiltily” when Ramchand observes that all shop assistants are “already in place” is the key clue — guilt arises when someone feels they've fallen short of a standard others have met.

steps.title: Apply the emotion to the choices
steps.content: Choice A identifies Ramchand's remorse about arriving later than the other assistants. B, C, and D either add unsupported details or misidentify his emotional state. That matches choice A — A is correct.
